# haven — Authors

This project was created and is maintained by the contributors listed below. This file records primary authors and major contributors for attribution.

## Primary authors

- Vincent Huybrechts - Owner — <https://github.com/huybrechtsxyz>

## Major contributors

See [CONTRIBUTORS](./contributors.md) for the list of contributors.

## How to add or update entries

- Open a pull request adding or updating your entry with name, role, GitHub profile link, and a short note about your contribution.
- For automated attribution, consider using the all-contributors specification: <https://allcontributors.org/>

## Notes

- This file is for author attribution and is separate from CONTRIBUTORS.md, which may list broader community contributions.
- Adding your name does not imply formal maintainership unless explicitly stated in project governance.
